summary: Comprehensive testing of new email/password authentication features completed. Backend: 21/21 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements working correctly - login screen, registration, error handling, and navigation flows verified. All new auth endpoints working as expected.

issues: Deprecation warnings: shadow* style props (non-critical, React Native Web compatibility)
useNativeDriver not supported warning (expected in web preview, non-critical)

critical_code_review_comments: Email/Password Auth Implementation: Properly implemented with bcrypt password hashing
Password hashing uses bcrypt with salt (lines 153-159 in server.py)
Session tokens properly generated with 'session_' prefix for email auth
Duplicate email returns 409 with user-friendly message: 'An account with this email already exists. Please sign in.'
Wrong password returns 401 with generic message: 'Invalid email or password' (security best practice)
Google OAuth users trying email-login get helpful error: 'This account uses Google Sign-In. Please use Continue with Google instead.'
Password hash excluded from API responses (security best practice)
Frontend properly handles all error states with user-friendly messages
Session persistence working correctly via AsyncStorage
Onboarding flow triggers correctly for new users after registration/login

success_rate.backend: 100% (21/21 tests passed - 8 new email/password auth tests + 13 existing tests)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements present and functional, error handling working, navigation flows correct)
